title: Reference Standard
description: Schema for a reference standard citation — a pointer to a governing standard or code referenced in specification requirements. Contains citation metadata only, never standards text.

issuing_body.description: Organization that publishes the standard (e.g., 'ASTM International', 'ICC').

relevance.description: Description of why this standard is referenced in the specification.

edition.description: Edition year or version number of the standard.

applicable_sections.description: CSI sections where this standard is referenced.
